{{Quote|We cannot let this gross violation of Hutt space pass without comment. Nal Hutta and the Empire have long held to a policy of non-interference in one another's affairs, and it pains the Hutt people to see the agreement violated without so much as a by-your-leave. We request an immediate explanation.|Smebba Dunk comments on the Empire's show of force on Nar Shaddaa|<ref name="GNN7" />}}
'''Smebba Dunk''' was the head of the [[Grand Hutt Council/Legends|Hutt Ruling Council]] when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] deployed armed forces to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] 's [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]].

{{Char-stub}}
